description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark hip roof and a combination of stone and wood paneling on the exterior walls. The house features large windows, especially on the ground floor, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious patio area with outdoor furniture and an umbrella is visible, surrounded by a low stone wall and metal fencing. The property includes a well-maintained lawn that wraps around the house, with paved walkways and landscaped shrubbery near the entrance. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns, providing a welcoming approach. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, blending natural materials with geometric lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, stone and wood exterior, large windows, and a spacious patio area surrounded by a lawn and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, patio with outdoor furniture, and landscaped approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone wall, wood paneling, and the expanse of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, large windows, and the open lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the stone facade, window arrangement, and fenced boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in pairs
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a prominent main door
